notes: Seed projection from CTO audit 2026-07-22. Amended contract: 212 clean-public roles across 49 clean-canonical companies (74 raw minus 19 synthetic-only minus merged dups). Full 49-company dataset pending Codex generator. Render-dedupe by normalized name handles DB duplicate records.

signals.ask: Can you show me the exact base salary in writing?
Which allowances are included — transport, meals, phone?
How is overtime calculated and when is it paid?
What deductions come off the gross — tax, SSF, insurance?
What are the official start and finish times?
How often does the team work past the stated finishing time?
Are rest days guaranteed or frequently rescheduled?
Is the shift rotation fixed or does it change week to week?
Can leave be requested without penalty or informal pressure?
When mistakes happen, are corrections private or public?
Is safety equipment provided and actually used on the floor?
Are parental and family leave policies applied in practice?
What training happens in the first 90 days?
Who reports to whom, and how are decisions communicated?
Are promotion criteria written down and applied consistently?
Does the company support Academy courses or external learning?
